title: Hermes Benchmark Record
description: One record per orchestrated task. This is the fuel for the Tier-0 self-tuning loop. Log everything; unlogged decisions cannot be tuned.

complexity_actual.description: post-hoc: what it turned out to need. The gap between predicted and actual is the key tuning signal.

cost_usd.description: total across all model calls for this task

fallbacks_triggered.description: provider chain hops due to outage/rate-limit

human_touched.description: did a human have to intervene (Gate H or otherwise)?

compression_used.description: per-layer record of whether compression ran. null/false where it didn't.

compression_ratio.description: compressed_tokens / original_tokens across compressed layers (lower = more squashed). 1.0 = no compression.

tokens_saved.description: original minus compressed tokens, net of the small-model call cost used to compress. Can be negative if compression cost more than it saved.

quality_score.description: outcome quality. Define per task_type: e.g. for code = passed tests + lint + review; for data = % rows correct. See quality rubric in benchmark-template.md.

quality_thresholds_met.description: did it clear the minimum bar for this task_type?

feedback.description: Upward feedback from a tier to the Architect. Populated only when something was off (bottleneck, missing context, skill gap). This is what powers the self-teaching planner loop — see ROADMAP future phase. null/absent on clean runs.

from_tier.description: which tier is reporting (e.g. executor_medium, verifier)

bottleneck.description: what slowed or blocked the work

missing_context.description: context the planner should have gathered up front but didn't

skill_gap.description: a capability the planner lacked (e.g. 'did not ask about dependency graph')

suggestion.description: concrete proposed skill/question to add to the planner

escalations.reason: Sonnet flagged low confidence on circular-import edge case; collaborative debug with GPT-5.4

feedback.missing_context: module dependency graph was not provided up front
feedback.skill_gap: planner did not ask about cross-module dependencies before routing
feedback.suggestion: add planner question: 'are there cross-module/circular dependencies?' for refactor tasks

example.notes: Complexity under-predicted by 2. Architect should consider bumping multi-file refactors toward the hard tier by default.
